title: Call Me By Your Name
description: A summer romance between a student and a scholar in 1980s Italy.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
description: A painter falls for the woman whose portrait she is commissioned to paint.

title: In the Mood for Love
description: Two neighbors suspect their spouses of having an affair.

title: La La Land
description: A jazz musician and actress fall in love in Los Angeles.

title: Titanic
description: An epic love story aboard a doomed ship.

title: Fury Road
description: A breathtaking post-apocalyptic chase shot like a painting in motion.

title: Oldboy
description: A man imprisoned for 15 years seeks his mysterious captor.

title: No Country for Old Men
description: A hunter stumbles upon drug money and a relentless killer follows.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker in a visually stunning battle for Gotham.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
description: A legendary concierge and his protege get caught up in a murder mystery.

title: Knives Out
description: A detective investigates the death of a wealthy crime novelist.

title: The Nice Guys
description: A mismatched pair investigate a missing girl in 1970s LA.

title: Burn After Reading
description: A CIA memoir falls into the hands of two gym employees.

title: The Hangover
description: Three groomsmen wake up in Vegas with no memory of the night before.

title: Midsommar
description: A couple travels to Sweden for a festival that takes a sinister turn.

title: Hereditary
description: A family unravels dark secrets after a tragedy.

title: The Witch
description: A Puritan family encounters evil forces in 1630s New England.

title: Get Out
description: A man uncovers something unsettling on a visit to his girlfriends family.

title: A Quiet Place
description: A family must live in near silence while hunted by creatures that hunt by sound.

title: Blade Runner 2049
description: A blade runner uncovers a long-buried secret that threatens civilization.

title: Under the Skin
description: An alien seductress preys on men in Scotland.

title: Annihilation
description: A biologist enters a mysterious quarantined zone full of mutations.

title: Mulholland Drive
description: An amnesiac woman and an aspiring actress investigate a Hollywood mystery.

title: Interstellar
description: Astronauts travel through a wormhole to find a new home for humanity.

title: Requiem for a Dream
description: Four people in New York City spiral into addiction and broken dreams.

title: Manchester by the Sea
description: A man returns to his hometown after his brother dies.

title: The Tree of Life
description: A family in 1950s Texas grapples with loss and the meaning of existence.

description: A young man struggles with identity and sexuality in Miami.

title: Schindlers List
description: A businessman saves over a thousand Jewish lives during the Holocaust.
